service.name: Stability AI API
service.description_for_ai: Generate images using Stable Diffusion models. Stable Image Core, Ultra, and Stable Diffusion 3. Best open-weight image generation. Use for creating illustrations, product images, artistic content.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Generate image from text prompt using Stable Diffusion. Use for art creation, product mockups, illustrations. Returns PNG/JPEG.

agent_hints.model_tip: Use core for fast cheap images, ultra for highest quality, sd3 for photorealism.
